readyArgv: DO $bootstrap$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'benchmark') THEN EXECUTE 'CREATE ROLE benchmark LOGIN'; END IF; END $bootstrap$; ALTER DATABASE postgres OWNER TO benchmark; ALTER ROLE validator NOLOGIN; SELECT 1
